summary: Clean, focused fix that bridges the perps custom pay flow with standard confirmation blocking alerts. Hooks are context-safe and the change is no-op for the standard Perps balance flow.

comments.body: The new mocks return `[]` which prevents test breakage, but no test exercises the blocking alert path (e.g., mocking the hooks to return a blocking alert and asserting the button is disabled / error message is rendered). Consider adding at least one test that validates `hasBlockingPayAlerts` actually disables the button.
